channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Penguins' Crosby scores 600th NHL goal
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby would’ve liked his 600th NHL goal to come in a win Crosby became the 21sth player to reach the mark when scored in the second period of the Pittsburgh Penguins' 6-1 loss to the Utah Hockey Club on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets look for coach, GM amid chaos
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – With the Jets’ season completely off the rails, it wasn't a big surprise when General Manager Joe Douglas was fired this week. Changes need to be made, and Douglas was carrying around a 30-64 record over five-plus seasons.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Jason Kelce chugs beers during eventful visit to Appalachian State tailgate
item.description: Jason Kelce once again put his talent on full display. Before Appalachian State kicked off against James Madison, the retired NFL star chugged beers and interacted with fans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man City routed 4-0 by Tottenham in fifth-straight defeat as crisis deepens for Pep Guardiola
item.description: It started as an evening of celebration for Manchester City. It ended with the four-time defending Premier League champion conceding four goals and falling to a fifth-straight loss in all competitions as it faces a deepening crisis in a season that is threatening to unravel.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Jose State volleyball gets first-round bye at MW Tournament; Spartans scheduled to open against team that refused to play them in regular season
item.description: The Spartans are set to face either Utah State or Boise State in the second round, are waiting to see if a Colorado judge will allow alleged transgender athlete to play.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Stanford fades in fourth quarter, loses Big Game to Cal in heartbreaking fashion
item.description: Stanford loses fourth Big Game in a row, falls to 3-8 after blowing 21-10 lead going to fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: Stephen A. Smith's claim that Giants reached out to ESPN about Elle Duncan's criticism is false: report
item.description: No one from the New York Giants reached out to ESPN complaining about Elle Duncan's segment criticizing Daniel Jones despite Stephen A Smith's claim otherwise, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg thrives in first true road environment, quieting Arizona crowd with 24 points
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (AP) — Duke freshman phenom Cooper Flagg got his first taste of a true college road atmosphere on Friday night, playing in front of a raucous announced crowd of 14,634 at Arizona's McKale Center. For a few early moments, he looked a little nervous. It was fleeting.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai'Den Thomas leads No. 23 UNLV to a 27-16 victory over San Jose State
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Jai'Den Thomas ran for 135 yards and the go-ahead touchdown in the third quarter to help No. 23 UNLV keep its conference title hopes alive with a 27-16 victory over San Jose State on Friday night. The Rebels (9-2, 5-1 Mountain West, No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caprock Academy Hockey plays first ever varsity game
item.description: The Caprock Academy Eagles -- featuring players from all five Valley schools (Grand Junction, Palisade, Fruita, Central and Caprock) -- kicked off their inaugural varsity season at the Jorgensen Event Center in Gunnison against Colorado Academy.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Chargers' Week 16 matchup becomes first ever NFL game flexed to a Thursday. Some fans aren't happy
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers are surging at the moment, and the NFL is beginning to take notice. For the first time ever, the NFL has moved a game up three days from Sunday to a Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU women's soccer "feeling pretty good" ahead of NCAA tournament
item.description: Colorado Mesa women’s soccer is in. The Mavs received an at-large bid into the Division II NCAA tournament.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls have no answers for Giannis, fall to Bucks, 122-106
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Bulls answered the bell Wednesday night after trailing the Milwaukee Bucks by 18 points in the first half. They just had no answer for Giannis Antetokounmpo.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: CMU women's basketball uses big 2nd quarter to down CSU Pueblo
item.description: From three balls, to great defense in the paint, to great team passing Mesa out-scored the Thunderwolves 28-10 in the second.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Hillsborough County man files lawsuit against Netflix over Tyson-Paul fight streaming issues
item.description: A class action lawsuit was filed in Hillsborough County on Monday against Netflix over alleged streaming issues during the fight between legendary brawler Mike Tyson and former YouTuber Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Connor Bedard trying to break out of slump as the Blackhawks struggle to score
item.description: Bedard was terrific last season, living up to the considerable hype that has followed him around for years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU still controls own destiny for Big 12 Championship
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is in a position it hasn't been in all season long -- trying to bounce back from a loss. The Cougars suffered their first defeat of the season Saturday night, a disappointing 17-13 loss to Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USD Men's Soccer to host UC Davis in NCAA Tournament
item.description: The Toreros are going to the big dance, though they don't necessarily like the song that's playing. The Toreros earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament after they captured their third straight West Coast Conference Title on Saturday with their (1-0) win over Loyola Marymount.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
